results.title: Le Phoenix à Coaticook l’instant d’un match
results.description: Après Lac-Mégantic, le Phoenix de Sherbrooke visitera Coaticook afin d'y affronter les Cataractes de Shawinigan.

results.title: ITV drop Gareth Southgate clanger as angry World Cup viewers turn off TV
results.description: ITV viewers were left furious after a huge mistake on the first night of the World Cup.

results.title: ITV discover big problem with bank-breaking World Cup studio as everyone says same thing
results.description: It was the first night of the World Cup, which saw South Africa lose to Mexico in the first game before South Korea beat Czechia 2-1 in the early hours of Friday morning

results.title: WAGs turned celebs who made the World Cup glam and what they did next
results.description: With the World Cup kicking off, Daily Star looks at some of the wives and girlfriends of footballing greats ended up shaping the story of the World Cup more than their partners
